caption: The video displays a black background with white text appearing in different positions. The text, which reads "Les impacts des inégalités sur les femmes", is initially positioned in the upper-left quadrant. It then shifts to the upper-right quadrant, followed by a move to the lower-left quadrant, and finally settling in the lower-right quadrant. No people, objects, or other visual elements are present; the only activity is the movement of this single phrase across the screen in a sequential pattern. The font is a clean, sans-serif white typeface that contrasts sharply against the solid black backdrop. There are no logos or other graphics visible throughout the sequence.
